title: Fit test - Failing the fit test
scenario: Fit Test displays correct pass/fail visual feedback and instructional text for earbud seal on Voyager Free 60/60+ and Voyager Free 20
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. From the Home screen, tap on the connected Poly Voyager Free 60/60+ or Voyager Free 20 device.
3. Navigate to Device Settings → Audio Settings → Fit Test.
4. Place both earbuds securely in your ears to simulate a proper fit condition.
5. Tap the "Run Fit Test" button to start the test.
6. Observe the visual feedback on the Fit Test screen after the test completes.
7. Tap the "Cancel" button during or after the test.
8. Verify the user is returned to the Device Home screen or Onboarding screen.
9. Repeat steps 1-3, but this time place the earbuds on a table (not in ears) to simulate a poor fit condition.
10. Tap the "Run Fit Test" button again.
11. Observe the visual feedback on the Fit Test screen after the test completes.
expected: - For proper fit (earbuds in ears): Green "Good" icon is displayed with instructional text indicating a good seal. "Retry" and "Cancel" buttons are visible. - For poor fit (earbuds on table): Yellow "Fail" icon is displayed with instructional text indicating a poor seal. "Retry" and "Cancel" buttons are visible. - Tapping "Cancel" returns the user to the Device Home screen or Onboarding screen.
